name: iHeartRadio Tech Blog
description: Engineering and technology blog from iHeartRadio covering machine learning, testing, personalization, and developer culture.

posts.title: Element Location In XCUITests
posts.author: Sreekala Kutty
posts.summary: Guide covering techniques for locating UI elements in iOS automated testing using XCUI, including accessibility identifiers, predicates, and hierarchical searches.

posts.title: The Importance of Utterance Testing in App Development
posts.author: Chitra Selvaraj
posts.summary: Explores how iHeartRadio tests voice assistant integration with Alexa and Google through utterance testing to ensure accurate speech recognition and natural language understanding.

posts.title: Junior Development @ iHeartRadio
posts.author: Sarah Morris O'Keefe
posts.summary: Personal account of junior developer onboarding experience, mentorship opportunities, and collaborative team environment at a Fortune 500 company.

posts.title: iHeartRadio HackWeek 2021
posts.author: Sarah Morris O'Keefe
posts.summary: Annual week-long hackathon event featuring cross-departmental teams creating innovative projects, with winners including SpeakerBoxx for interactive radio host engagement.

posts.title: My Playlist for Free Users
posts.author: Priyanka Chakraborti
posts.summary: Technical deep-dive on machine learning approach using Bayesian ranking to augment user-created playlists with intelligent track recommendations at scale.

posts.title: Cypress - JavaScript E2E Testing Framework
posts.author: Chitra Selvaraj
posts.summary: Comprehensive guide explaining Cypress framework benefits, features, implementation strategies, and best practices for end-to-end web application testing.

posts.title: Predicting Musical Tastes to Improve Personalization
posts.author: Brian Schmidt
posts.summary: Machine learning approach using neural networks to build taste profiles predicting user genre preferences, enabling personalized playlist recommendations.

posts.title: Real-Time Music Recommendations for New Users with Amazon SageMaker
posts.author: Jordan Rosenblum
posts.summary: Details how demographic data and registration preferences power real-time genre recommendations using LightGBM models served via AWS SageMaker, achieving 8.7% CTR lift.

posts.title: iHeartRadio Summer HackWeek 2019
posts.author: Tom Drapeau
posts.summary: Event recap of annual week-long engineering retreat where 65 professionals across roles built 21 innovative projects ranging from AR experiences to hardware implementations.

posts.title: iHeartRadio Winter HackDay 2019
posts.author: Andrew Vickory
posts.summary: Twenty-four-hour hackathon featuring 56 participants creating practical solutions, with winners including audio fingerprinting pipeline and podcast captioning features.
